1→/*
     2→Post-Deployment Seed Data Script - PART_OPERATION_AREAS Table
     3→--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
     4→This script preloads the PART_OPERATION_AREAS table with manufacturing area definitions.
     5→Uses MERGE to handle both INSERT and UPDATE operations (idempotent).
     6→
     7→Manufacturing Areas include:
     8→  - Production areas (SMT, WAVE, ICT, FCT, etc.)
     9→  - Quality control areas (Quality, Inspection, etc.)
    10→  - Support areas (Rework, RMA, Warehouse, etc.)
    11→  - Assembly areas (Hand Assembly, Components Assembly, etc.)
    12→  - Packaging areas (Packout, Shipping, etc.)
    13→
    14→Note: AreaID is IDENTITY, used as the business key for matching.
    15→All areas are for Facility_Key 167038 (Grand Rapids) unless otherwise specified.
    16→--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→*/
    18→
    19→SET IDENTITY_INSERT [dbo].[PART_OPERATION_AREAS] ON;
    20→
    21→MERGE INTO [dbo].[PART_OPERATION_AREAS] AS Target
    22→USING (VALUES
    23→    (1, 'SMT', 1, 0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 1),
    24→    (2, 'WAVE', 1, 0, 4, 1, 1, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1),
    25→    (3, 'Conformal Coating', 0, 0, 5, 0, 0, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1),
    26→    (4, 'Router', 0, 0, 3, 1, 1, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1),
    27→    (5, 'ICT', 1, 0, 6, 1, 0, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1),
    28→    (6, 'FCT', 1, 0, 7, 1, 0, 1, 167038, 0, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1),

/*
Post-Deployment Seed Data Script - PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_ARRAY_INDEX_MASTERID Table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This script preloads the PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_ARRAY_INDEX_MASTERID table.
Uses MERGE to handle both INSERT and UPDATE operations (idempotent).

Master ID values: 1-2
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/

SET IDENTITY_INSERT [dbo].[PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_ARRAY_INDEX_MASTERID] ON;

MERGE INTO [dbo].[PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_ARRAY_INDEX_MASTERID] AS Target
USING (VALUES
    (1, '1'),
    (2, '2')
) AS Source (AUTOID, MASTERID)
ON Target.AUTOID = Source.AUTOID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        Target.MASTERID = Source.MASTERID
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
    INSERT (AUTOID, MASTERID)
    VALUES (Source.AUTOID, Source.MASTERID);

SET IDENTITY_INSERT [dbo].[PART_OPERATION_SERIALIZATION_ARRAY_INDEX_MASTERID] OFF;
